positive: An intricate, minimalist depiction of a vibrant bioluminescent forest scene. The main subject is a central, stylized, large flowering lotus blossom set against overlapping silhouettes of exotic, oversized tropical leaves and branches. The color palette must be highly saturated teals, electric blues, lime greens, and pops of magenta/purple. The style should be a blend of Art Deco symmetry and Japanese Ukiyo-e negative space design, optimized for circular repeat printing. Use strong, defined silhouettes and clean lines. Composition should be highly centered and symmetrical, suitable for a full chest graphic print. Flat graphic design quality, high contrast, vector aesthetic, perfect for screen printing or embroidery.
